snsReviews.description:
Honest Reveal of MEDICUBE Collagen Night Wrapping Mask
.
Medicube Collagen Night Wrapping Mask doesn’t actually increase collagen production. That’s because topical products without active, proven collagen-boosting ingredients like retinoids or peptides can’t penetrate deep enough to stimulate collagen synthesis.
What this mask does do really well is seal in your skincare routine, acting as a barrier to prevent your serums and creams from rubbing off on your pillow overnight. It’s incredibly gentle, lightweight, and doesn’t tug on the skin—perfect for locking in hydration and waking up with skin that still feels cared for. A great topcoat to your PM routine, just not a collagen miracle.

Non-greasy formula absorbs quickly.

Restores a vibrant glow to your complexion.

Attributes

Naturally rich in nutritious Asiatic Acid and Madecassoside.

Paraben-Free and soothing for sensitive skin.

Technology

Our versatile, anti-aging Cica Serum has a rich history. This concentrated infusion of marula oil, green tea and honeysuckle is expertly blended for maximum efficacy.

Cica is also known as Centella Asiatica or Tiger Grass because tigers in India are known to roll in Cica plants to soothe their wound. Cica has been used in Chinese medicine for centuries, and has even been used to treat soldiers recovering from battle.

Results

Instantly: Absorbs into dry skin for a vibrant glow.

24 hours: Skin appears more firm and elastic.

1 Month: Skin looks smooth and firm, with less visible wrinkles and redness.
Suggested Use
Start with clean, dry skin. Dispense a few drops. Warm the serum between your palms and press onto your face and neck. Follow with your favorite moisturizer if additional hydration is needed.
Other Ingredients
Water (aqua), propanediol, dimethicone, glycerin, pyrus malus (apple) fruit extract, peg-12 dimethicone, lactobacillus ferment, centella asiatica leaf extract, tetrahexyldecyl ascorbate, dimethicone crosspolymer, sclerocarya birrea seed oil, glucosamine hcl, camellia sinensis leaf extract, lonicera caprifolium (honeysuckle) flower extract, ammonium acryloyldimethyltaurate/vp copolymer, disodium edta, phenoxyethanol, xanthan gum, fragrance, caprylyl glycol, ethylhexylglycerin, hexylene glycol, sodium hydroxide.
Warnings
Caution: For external use only. If irritation develops discontinue use. If product enters eye, flush thoroughly with water. If accidentally ingested contact a physician. Keep out of reach of children.

snsReviews.title: matcha review - matcha yume from camellia sinensis 🍵 #matcha #matchapowder #matchareview
snsReviews.description:
spotted a cute cafe (@lepetitdep) when i was exploring quebec city and saw this local canadian matcha brand that a friend recommended! i’m in a phase right now where i want to try different matcha powders 😬

i ended up getting their matcha yume matcha powder. i used my usual recipe for a matcha latte and found it to be not as strong as my go-to matcha powder. the colour did seem promising tho 🥲 overall, not bad! good matcha to start with if you want to explore making matcha at home ☺️ matcha flavour is there but i personally stronger matcha 😬

rating: 7.5/10
price: matcha yume - $21 (tax included) for 40g tin

snsReviews.title: matcha review - camellia sinensis’ matcha sora 🍵 #matcha #matchapowder #matchareview
snsReviews.description:
matcha review - @camellia.sinensis’ matcha sora 🍵

compared to their ceremonial grade yume matcha, this one wasn’t as vibrant of a green. flavour wise, it does have a milder matcha flavour compared to my go-to matcha powder. i will say though, this matcha is very affordable and i’d definitely recommend this brand if you’re just starting out your matcha journey at home! for just $32 for 100g, that’s a really good price 👀 

rating: 7.5/10
price: $18 for 40g tin / $32 for 100g

my matcha ratio:
- 3.5g matcha powder
- 35g warm water 
- 175g oat milk
- sweetener of choice (i just use sugar)
- ice

snsReviews.title: Barrier repair in a tube 💚 Meebak’s cica cream soothes and hydrates without the heaviness.
snsReviews.description:
This Meebak Cica Cream is my go-to when my skin feels sensitive, red, or over-exfoliated. It’s lightweight, non-greasy, and packed with centella asiatica to help calm inflammation and support the skin barrier 💚

🌿 Star Ingredient: Centella Asiatica (Cica)
Helps soothe irritation, reduce redness, and strengthen the skin.

🧴 Texture:
Soft, creamy, and absorbs fast, perfect under SPF or before bed.

🤍 Great for all skin types, especially if you're dealing with sensitivity, dryness, or breakouts.
